summary: SendGrid Email Notifications and Stripe Payment Integration testing complete. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: Email Notifications page (4/4 checks), Payments tab in Super Admin (3/3 checks). All requested features working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns error with test Stripe API key (sk_test_emergent) - expected behavior, requires valid Stripe production key

integration_issues.issue: 403 errors on sidebar order and notifications fetch - these are tenant-specific endpoints being called with super admin token

critical_code_review_comments: BACKEND: SendGrid settings endpoints correctly require tenant auth (lines 11375-11440)
BACKEND: Stripe checkout creation properly handles packages and creates transaction records (lines 11609-11673)
BACKEND: Payment records CRUD correctly restricted to super_admin only (lines 11751-11850)
FRONTEND: EmailNotificationsPage.js has proper SendGrid settings form with API key, sender email, notification toggles
FRONTEND: PaymentsPage.js has comprehensive payments management with stats cards, checkout dialog, add record dialog
FRONTEND: Super Admin routing correctly redirects to /saas-admin for all protected routes (App.js lines 92-93)
seed_data_creation: Test payment records created and cleaned up during pytest execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: SendGrid and Stripe integration complete: 1) GET /api/payments/packages returns 6 subscription packages (basic/pro/enterprise monthly/yearly), 2) GET/PUT /api/notifications/sendgrid/settings works for tenant users, 3) POST /api/payments/create-checkout requires valid Stripe API key, 4) Payment records CRUD restricted to super_admin, 5) Email Notifications page at /email-notifications has toggle for enable, API key input, sender email/name, notification email, and notification type toggles (new sale, low stock, daily/weekly reports), 6) Payments tab visible in Super Admin /saas-admin panel under 'المدفوعات' tab showing payment records table.

GET_payments_packages.description: Returns 6 subscription packages: basic_monthly, basic_yearly, pro_monthly, pro_yearly, enterprise_monthly, enterprise_yearly

GET_sendgrid_settings.description: Returns SendGrid configuration (API key masked, enabled status, notification preferences)

PUT_sendgrid_settings.description: Updates SendGrid settings, preserves masked API key if unchanged

POST_payments_create_checkout.description: Endpoint exists and validates package_id. Returns Stripe API error with test key - expected behavior

elements_verified: SendGrid settings section with API key, sender email, sender name, notification email inputs
Notification type toggles: new sale, low stock, daily report, weekly report
Payments tab (المدفوعات) visible in SaaS Admin panel
Payment records table with columns: subscriber, amount, subscription type, payment method, period, date
Table is empty when no records exist

notes.stripe_integration: Stripe checkout requires valid API key (sk_test_emergent is a placeholder). The emergentintegrations library is used for Stripe integration.
notes.sendgrid_integration: SendGrid requires valid API key for actual email sending. Settings can be saved and retrieved without valid key.
notes.super_admin_routing: Super Admin users are automatically redirected to /saas-admin for all routes. Payments management is embedded as a tab in the SaaS Admin panel, not a separate /payments route.
